title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ECIL - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ECIL - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ECIL. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About ECIL:
ECIL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL!
